brandProfile.tagline: For your bright future, your best health partner from USA.

companyFacts.fact: Manufacturing factory in Los Angeles, USA (2006).
Investor mentioned: Bright Future Pharmaceutical Laboratories Limited (Hong Kong).
Mission statement emphasizes improving quality of life with health products and service.
Two manufacturing sites listed in Los Angeles, USA.

contactOrderInfo.notes: Missing from source; requires manual confirmation.

products.name: NMN 4500
products.shortDescription: Premium-selected capsule product positioned for anti-aging and gene-repair support.
products.description: Product page states NMN 4500 with anti-aging, DNA repair, sirtuin activation, and brain/heart-health positioning.
products.usageInstructions: Take 2 capsules per day.
warnings: Not intended as substitute for drugs or medicines
Not intended for children and pregnant women

products.name: NMN Duo Release
products.shortDescription: NMN-based tablet product positioned for energy and DNA-repair support.
products.description: Page presents NMN Duo Release with technology-focused positioning and 24-hour DNA-repair claim language.
products.usageInstructions: Take 1 tablet per day in the morning.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs
Keep out of reach of children
Not recommended for pregnant women

products.name: NMN Sharp Mind
products.shortDescription: NMN line product with brain-health positioning.
products.description: Page highlights brain-health formula language with NMN, resveratrol, and ginkgo biloba extract mention.
products.usageInstructions: Take 2 capsules per day.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs
Keep out of reach of children
Not recommended for pregnant women

products.name: YouthEver
products.shortDescription: Anti-aging themed pouch product in the premium-selected set.
products.description: Product page highlights antioxidant berry language and resveratrol + NMN combination messaging.
products.usageInstructions: 1 pouch/day.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs

products.name: NMN Coffee
products.shortDescription: Coffee-format NMN product with longevity and endurance positioning.
products.description: Page describes NMN coffee sachets with hot-water preparation and longevity/metabolic support claims.
products.usageInstructions: Dissolve one sachet in 140ml hot water; 1 sachet each time, 2 times per day; brew at 80-90°C.
warnings: Not intended as substitute for drugs or medicines
Not intended for children and pregnant women

products.name: Refined Yunzhi Essence
products.shortDescription: Yunzhi extract capsule product in the immune-booster line.
products.description: Page highlights Yunzhi source purity and concentration language with PSP mention.
benefits: Recovery-support positioning for severe immune challenges
products.usageInstructions: 2 capsules twice daily; page text suggests consistent use.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs

products.name: Quad-Reishi Capsules
products.shortDescription: Four-extract reishi blend capsule product.
products.description: Product page positions the formula as liver and immune support with a 1:1:1:1 ratio statement.
products.usageInstructions: Take 2 capsules per day; page notes at least 3 weeks for initial effects.
warnings: Not intended as substitute for drugs or medicines
Not intended for children and pregnant women

products.name: Pure & Broken Ganoderma Spores
products.shortDescription: Ganoderma spores capsule product with immunity focus.
products.description: Product page highlights organic sourcing, high nutritional value, and preventive-health positioning.
products.usageInstructions: 2 capsules daily in morning or evening; consistent use suggested.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs
Keep out of reach of children
Not recommended for pregnant or lactating women and children

products.name: Pure & Broken Ganoderma Spores Oil Deluxe
products.shortDescription: Spore-oil deluxe capsule product from the ganoderma line.
products.description: Page includes concentration statement and cardiovascular/metabolic/immune-health positioning.
products.usageInstructions: Two capsules daily in morning or evening.
warnings: Not intended to be used as substitute for drugs or medicines

products.name: 4 in 1 Coffee Series
products.shortDescription: Milky-flavor coffee series with three variant formulas.
products.description: Page lists Cordyceps Coffee, Reishi Coffee, and Ginseng Coffee under one 4-in-1 series.

variants.name: Cordyceps Coffee
variants.benefit: Improves physical health and enhances immunity

variants.name: Reishi Coffee
variants.benefit: Promotes detoxifying function of liver and kidney

variants.name: Ginseng Coffee
variants.benefit: Regulates endocrine/metabolism and helps maintain proper heart function

products.usageInstructions: Brew with water temperatures of 80-90°C for best extraction.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs

products.name: GymEffect Capsules
products.shortDescription: Capsule product positioned for healthy glucose metabolism.
products.description: Page language emphasizes blood-glucose support and sugar-level maintenance.
products.usageInstructions: 2 capsules daily before meals.
warnings: Not intended as substitute for drugs or medicines
Not intended for children and pregnant women

products.name: MicrO2 Cycle Tablets
products.shortDescription: Tablet product in cardiovascular line with raw-herb extraction language.
products.description: Page presents superior-herb extraction and technology-for-efficacy positioning.
products.usageInstructions: 3 tablets per time, 3 times daily.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs
Keep out of reach of children
Not recommended for pregnant users

products.name: CereBrain Tablets
products.shortDescription: Tablet product positioned for brain blood-flow and cell-metabolism support.
products.description: Page language references memory-loss support and anti-aging brain function support.
benefits: Enhance blood flow and nutrient delivery to brain
Useful in counter-acting age-related memory loss
products.usageInstructions: 2 tablets per time, three times daily.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs
People with epilepsy should not take ginkgo
Not recommended for children, pregnant and lactating women
People with diabetes should ask their doctor before taking ginkgo

products.name: Relivin Tea
products.shortDescription: Tea product with green-tea and luobuma language on anti-aging and cardiovascular support.
products.description: Page references cholesterol and blood-pressure support positioning plus free-radical language.
products.usageInstructions: Infuse one tea bag for 10-15 minutes; each bag can be brewed 2-3 times; may consume one tea bag daily.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs

products.name: Detoxilive Capsules
products.shortDescription: Soy-lecithin softgel product with detox flow messaging.
products.description: Page highlights soy PC content and absorbability language with detox support positioning.
products.usageInstructions: 1 soft gel capsule with meal per time, 3 times daily.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs
Keep out of reach of children
Not recommended for pregnant and lactating women and children

products.name: Feminergy Capsules
products.shortDescription: Grape-seed extract capsule product with skin-tone and anti-aging positioning.
products.description: Page references vineyard grape-seed source and concentration language.

products.usageInstructions: 1 capsule half an hour after meal, twice daily.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs

products.name: Xpower Coffee
products.shortDescription: Coffee-format men's vitality product with patented-ingredient claim language.
products.description: Page presents male vitality and sperm-motility positioning with hot/cold serving directions.
products.usageInstructions: Dissolve one sachet in 180ml hot water and serve hot or with ice/cold drink; do not exceed 5 sachets daily; brew at 80-90°C for best extraction.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs
Not recommended for pregnant/lactating women and children

products.name: ProstatRelax Capsules
products.shortDescription: Capsule product with prostate-health and sexual-performance positioning.
products.description: Page includes US-patent language and manufacturing quality-class claims.

warnings: Not a substitute for drugs
Keep out of reach of children

products.shortDescription: Capsule product with male vitality and endurance positioning.
products.description: Page presents formula-upgrade and quality-of-life language with male-performance focus.
products.usageInstructions: 1-2 capsules daily after meal.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs
Keep out of reach of children
Not intended for women and children

products.name: GluzoJoint-Ultra Pro
products.shortDescription: Joint and bone support product with four-in-one positioning.

warnings: Dietary supplement; not intended to substitute for drugs
Not suitable for children, teenagers, pregnant women, and nursing mothers
Shellfish allergy warning noted

products.name: GluzoJoint-F Capsules
products.shortDescription: Joint-care capsule product with glucosamine focus.

benefits: Long-term use recommendation in source copy
products.usageInstructions: 1 capsule per time, twice daily with meal; 6 weeks or longer, with cyclical yearly use text.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs

products.name: ArthroXtra Tablets
products.shortDescription: Joint-support tablet product for physically active users.
products.description: Page references glucosamine/chondroitin composition and active-lifestyle support positioning.
products.usageInstructions: 2 tablets per time, twice daily with meals; at least 3 weeks for initial effects.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs

products.name: ZaminoCal Capsules
products.shortDescription: Bone and teeth support capsule formula.
products.description: Page highlights calcium-absorption language and mineral blend positioning.

products.usageInstructions: 2 capsules per day with meals.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs
Keep out of reach of children
Consult physician if pregnant, nursing, or taking medications

products.name: ConstiRelax Solution
products.shortDescription: Digestive product positioned for constipation support.
products.description: Page references FOS-active ingredient and Radix Astragali with intestinal-flora support language.
benefits: For chronic or acute constipation positioning
products.usageInstructions: 1 sachet before meal, twice daily; half dose for children.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs
Keep out of reach of children

products.name: NTDiarr Pills
products.shortDescription: Pill product for diarrhea and stomach-ache positioning.
products.description: Page lists age-banded dosage instructions and multiple botanical ingredients.
benefits: People with diarrhea and stomach ache caused by diarrhea
products.usageInstructions: Over 15 years old: 4 pills at a time; 11-15 years: 3 pills at a time; 5-10 years: 2 pills at a time; take three times daily or as directed by physician.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs
Keep out of reach of children
Exceeding stated dosage is dangerous

products.name: Novel-Depile Capsules
products.shortDescription: Capsule product with hemorrhoid-relief positioning.
products.description: Page highlights citrus-derived ingredients and schedule-based usage.
benefits: Positioned for chronic venous insufficiency and chronic/acute hemorrhoid
products.usageInstructions: Take with meals; chronic venous insufficiency: 2 capsules daily; chronic hemorrhoid disease: 2 capsules daily; acute phase schedule described in source.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs

products.name: Probio3
products.shortDescription: Probiotic-plus-prebiotic digestive product.
products.description: Page states 7 strains of bacteria + 2 prebiotics and provides adult/children intake guidance.
benefits: For individuals with constipation or diarrhea
For weak immune systems and proneness to illness
products.usageInstructions: Dissolve in water or milk below 45°C; adults 1-2 sachets/day, temporary 2-3 during discomfort; children dose guidance shown in source.
warnings: Keep out of reach of children
Not suitable for children under 1 year old

products.name: Veggie Veggie
products.shortDescription: Vegetable/fruit fermentation sachet product with detox and weight-management positioning.
products.description: Page claims 120 kinds of vegetable/fruit fermentation and probiotic blend.
ingredients: Rainbow fruit and vegetable fermentation essence
products.usageInstructions: Brew with 100ml warm or cold water (do not exceed 45°) and drink after thorough mixing; source also recommends additional water intake.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs
Keep out of reach of children
Not intended for children under 1 year of age

products.name: Ez-Xlim
products.shortDescription: Tablet product positioned for fat/starch blocking and slimming support.
products.description: Page includes food-temptation and weight-management language with pre-meal timing.
products.usageInstructions: 3 tablets per time, 15 minutes before meal, two times daily.
warnings: Not a substitute for drugs
Keep out of reach of children
Not recommended for pregnant/lactating women and children

products.name: Blueberry Chewable Tablets for Sharp Vision
products.shortDescription: Kids chewable tablet product for eye-health positioning.

benefits: Prevent dizziness, myopia, and amblyopia positioning
products.usageInstructions: Take 2 tablets daily.
warnings: Dietary supplement; not intended to substitute for drugs/medicines
Suitable for children over 3 years old

products.name: Vitamin C Chewable Tablets
products.shortDescription: Orange-flavored vitamin C chewable product.
products.description: Page states 100mg vitamin C per orange-flavored granule and age-based serving guidance.
products.usageInstructions: Children 4-13: 1 tablet/day; children 14-17 and pregnant women: 1-2/day; breastfeeding mothers: 1-3/day; adults: 1-5/day.
warnings: Dietary supplement; not intended to substitute for drugs/medicines
Suitable for children over 3 years old

products.name: Calcium & Vitamin D3 Milk Tablets Strawberry Flavour
products.shortDescription: Calcium and vitamin D3 chewable product with strawberry flavor.
products.description: Page emphasizes bone-growth and healthy-tooth support positioning with age-banded dosage.
products.usageInstructions: Children: chew 1-2 tablets, 1-2 times/day; adults: chew 1-3 tablets, 1-2 times/day; chew before swallowing.
warnings: Dietary supplement; not intended to substitute for drugs/medicines
Suitable for children over 3 years old

products.name: Anatic Herbal Essence Soap
products.shortDescription: Herbal soap product with honey and tea extracts.
products.description: Page references sandalwood fragrance and moisturizing/anti-oxidizing support language.
products.usageInstructions: For external use.
warnings: Keep out of reach of children
For external use only

products.name: FemiCare Feminine Cleanser
products.shortDescription: Feminine cleanser product positioned for daily hygiene and comfort.
products.description: Page includes infection/discharge/odor positioning and a once-daily wash guidance line with treatment duration.
benefits: Reinforce vaginal resistance against infection positioning
products.usageInstructions: Read package insert carefully; for external use only; wash once a day for 7-10 days as treatment (as written on page).
warnings: For external use only

products.name: CoolRoll
products.shortDescription: Roller-ball topical oil product for minor discomforts.
products.description: Page presents portable roller-ball format and mosquito-bite/cold-related discomfort positioning.
benefits: For mosquito bites and cold-related headache/dizziness/fever/carsickness positioning
products.usageInstructions: Apply oil on area as needed to relax/unwind.
warnings: Keep out of reach of children
Not recommended for children and pregnant women
For external use only

products.name: Dr.Ts Tooth Paste
products.shortDescription: Toothpaste product with 4D care positioning.
products.description: Page highlights oral cleaning, cavity prevention, nourishment and fresh-breath messaging.
benefits: Thorough cleaning and cavity prevention positioning
products.usageInstructions: After meal or in the morning and night, brush correctly for no less than 2 mins.
warnings: Do not swallow
Children under 6 should be supervised by adults

products.name: Suma Grand
products.shortDescription: Skin-care product line presented as a five-item set.
products.description: Page presents a Suma Grand lineup with cleanser, face mask, toner, lotion, and cream; includes ingredient/warning panel and 'Restore Firmness in 10s' messaging.
products.usageInstructions: Apply as skin-care routine; detailed step order requires manual confirmation from packaging inserts.
warnings: For external use only
Do not use on wounded skin
Keep out of eyes
Stop use immediately if discomfort or allergy occurs

hero.headline: Your best health partner from USA
hero.supportingText: BF Suma is presented as a health-product company focused on research, manufacturing, distribution, and product quality.

items: Established in the United States (source claim).
Factory setup in Los Angeles, USA in 2006 (source claim).
Product expansion into Africa in 2010 (source claim).
cGMP/Halal marks shown in catalog (requires manual verification).

fieldsToSurface: price (missing from source -> hide or mark 'Contact for price')

productDetailPages.complianceNote: Health/supplement claims require manual compliance review before promotional rewriting.

faq.question: Are these products medicines?
faq.answer: Many product pages state 'not a substitute for drugs/medicines'. Use products only as labeled and seek medical guidance when needed.

faq.question: Who should use caution before use?
faq.answer: Multiple pages mention caution for children, pregnant/lactating users, or condition-specific users. Review each product page and label before use.

faq.question: Where are exact dosage instructions?
faq.answer: Each product page includes suggested usage. Final serving guidance should always be confirmed on package labeling.

about.title: BF Suma company profile
facts: Africa office presence listed in catalog

disclaimerContact.disclaimer: Catalog contains wellness/health claims and certification marks that require legal/compliance verification before final publication.

complianceSensitiveClaims: Anti-aging, DNA-repair, gene-repair, and disease-risk reduction language
requiresManualConfirmation: Final market pricing and product registration status
